description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow should install Python dependencies, run tests, and lint with various Python versions. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12, and include services for Redis. The workflow should check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, lint with flake8, start MongoDB, run tests, and run tests for a Django example app.
